puzzles.label: Queen Back Rank
puzzles.hint: Queen to captures bishop — back rank checkmate.

puzzles.label: Corner with Queen
puzzles.hint: Queen to g7 — king trapped in the corner!

puzzles.label: Queen + Rook
puzzles.hint: Queen to h2 — rook on g2 covers the g-file.

puzzles.label: Queen b8
puzzles.hint: Queen to b8 — king on a8 is mated.

puzzles.label: Queen + King
puzzles.hint: Queen to a7 — the king cannot escape.

puzzles.label: Queen f7
puzzles.hint: Queen to f7 — checkmate on the edge.

puzzles.label: Two Queens
puzzles.hint: Queen to h7 — the other queen controls the h-file.

puzzles.label: Queen h8
puzzles.hint: Queen to b8 — king has no moves.

puzzles.label: Queen d7
puzzles.hint: Queen to d7 — checkmate on the 7th rank.

puzzles.label: Queen a8
puzzles.hint: Queen to a8 — the king has no escape.
